How can we help you today?

Applying to Hull
Find out how to apply to Hull at all levels of study, from Undergraduate to Postgraduate Research
Clearing
Confused about Clearing? Get answers to all of your questions about the process.
Visiting the University
Answer all of your questions about visiting us, for an Open Day, Applicant Day, or any other reason
Fees and funding
Get help with all things finance and money related, including student loans and scholarships
Accommodation
Learn about moving in and out, how to apply, how to make payments and more
International students
Coming to Hull from another country? Here's everything you need to know.
Student support
Find out all about the different ways in which we can support you during your studies
Graduation
Step on to the stage with confidence – find out about dates, robing, tickets and more
Services for business
Learn how we can support your business through our different programmes and facilities
Jobs at Hull
Want to work for us? Find out more about the process for applying to work at Hull
Alumni
Learn about how you can support the University through donations, and how you can stay connected
Schools and colleges
Everything you need to know about our services for schools and colleges
Accessibility on campus
Get advice on how to find your way around our campus and what support is available

Trending questions

How do I apply to transfer to Hull?
How do I apply to Hull through UCAS?
What are the key UCAS application dates for 2026 entry?
What happens after I apply to Hull?
When should I apply for a postgraduate taught course?
Are there any deadlines for transfer applications?
When do I apply for undergraduate student finance?
Are there entry requirements for transferring to Hull?

Glossary

“We had a seminar, a lecture and a tutorial for three different modules today, as part of our bachelors degree – and this is just our first semester...”

If you have no idea what we’re talking about, it’s time to take a look at our University Glossary and get up to speed with higher education lingo.

Take a look

Get in touch

Can't find the answer you're looking for? Don't worry, help is at hand.
